item.name: Poro Roggo
item.description:
Enchanted familiar though it may be, kissing it will do nothing to alter its corporeal form.

Use item to acquire the Poro Roggo minion.
item.tooltip:
Indeed, there is no end to the
tasks that want for doing, ribbit.
    - Toro Roggo
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 90 and knocks back all enemies within range.
